# lib_mock_ofl-1.1-no-rfn_1

A fantastic open-source library that helps you do amazing things.

## Installation
`pip install lib_mock_ofl-1.1-no-rfn_1`

## Usage
Import the module and start using it immediately:
```python
import lib_mock_ofl-1.1-no-rfn_1
lib_mock_ofl-1.1-no-rfn_1.run()
```
